# Narintel — Narrative Intelligence Stack

> A specification-only repository defining a 4-layer architecture for NCP-driven story analysis, agent coordination, and creative advancement. Built on the Three-Universe Model (Engineer/Ceremony/StoryEngine), RISE Framework v1.2, and Indigenous-AI relational paradigms. Evolved from the Indigenous-AI Collaborative Platform (IAIP) rispecs.

**Version:** 1.0
**Framework:** RISE v1.2
**Published at:** https://docs.narintel.jgwill.com
**Status:** Germination (Specification Phase)
**Attribution:** Based on RISE Framework v1.2 by Guillaume D.Isabelle

## Architecture (4 Layers)

- [Layer 1 — Analysis](./rispecs/narrative-intelligence.langgraph.rispec.md): `narrative-intelligence` (LangGraph) — Core NCP analysis toolkit with nodes and graphs. NCP Loader, Narrative Traversal, Character Arc Generator, Thematic Tension Analyzer, Emotional Beat Classifier, Unified State Bridge.
- [Layer 2 — Tracing](./rispecs/narrative-tracing.langchain.rispec.md): `narrative-tracing` (LangChain/Langfuse) — Narrative-aware observability. Semantic span naming, cross-stack correlation, creative archaeology.
- [Layer 3 — Coordination](./rispecs/agentic-flywheel.flowise.rispec.md): `agentic-flywheel` (Flowise) — Narrative intent classification, NCP context injection, quality-driven flow selection.
- [Layer 3 — Routing](./rispecs/universal-router.langflow.rispec.md): `universal-router` (Langflow) — Three-universe event processing, multi-backend abstraction, K'é/Sacred Pause protocols.

## Foundation

- [NCP Schema](./rispecs/ncp-schema.rispec.md): Narrative Context Protocol v1.1 — Core data model. Players, Perspectives, Storybeats, Storypoints, Dynamics, Moments. Subtext (soul) vs Storytelling (surface).

## App Ecosystem (7 Role-Based Apps)

| App | Role | Universe | Key Question |
|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| [Architect Studio](./rispecs/app.architect-studio.md) | ARCHITECT | 🔧 ENGINEER | What structure can represent any story? |
| [Structurist Forge](./rispecs/app.structurist-forge.md) | STRUCTURIST | 📖 STORY_ENGINE | What happens, to whom, and why? |
| [Storyteller Loom](./rispecs/app.storyteller-loom.md) | STORYTELLER | 📖 STORY_ENGINE | How do we make this feel alive? |
| [Editor Anvil](./rispecs/app.editor-anvil.md) | EDITOR | 🔧 ENGINEER | Is this good enough? What needs improvement? |
| [Reader Sanctuary](./rispecs/app.reader-sanctuary.md) | READER | 📖 STORY_ENGINE | How does this make me feel? |
| [Collaborator Bridge](./rispecs/app.collaborator-bridge.md) | COLLABORATOR | 🔧 ENGINEER | How do I get the AI to understand what I want? |
| [Witness Circle](./rispecs/app.witness-circle.md) | WITNESS | 🙏 CEREMONY | Does this serve the deeper purpose? |

## Core Specifications

- [ncp-schema.rispec.md](./rispecs/ncp-schema.rispec.md): Narrative Context Protocol — core data model
- [narrative-intelligence.langgraph.rispec.md](./rispecs/narrative-intelligence.langgraph.rispec.md): NCP analysis toolkit (LangGraph)
- [narrative-tracing.langchain.rispec.md](./rispecs/narrative-tracing.langchain.rispec.md): Narrative-aware tracing (Langfuse)
- [agentic-flywheel.flowise.rispec.md](./rispecs/agentic-flywheel.flowise.rispec.md): Narrative intent classification (Flowise)
- [universal-router.langflow.rispec.md](./rispecs/universal-router.langflow.rispec.md): Three-universe routing (Langflow)
- [storytelling-roles-tooling.rispec.md](./rispecs/storytelling-roles-tooling.rispec.md): Seven roles and their tool needs

## Three-Universe Model

Every narrative event flows through three interpretive lenses simultaneously:
- **ENGINEER (Mia 🧠)**: Schema valid? Types correct? API callable?
- **CEREMONY (Ava8 🎨)**: K'é honored? Sacred pause? Relations ok?
- **STORY_ENGINE (Miette 🌸)**: Arc coherent? Theme threads? Beat sequence?

Synthesis produces unified responses. Ceremony leads when relational obligations exist.

## Trinity Personas

- **Mia 🧠**: Structural architect — schema validation, gap analysis, technical precision
- **Miette 🌸**: Emotional illuminator — arc resonance, narrative truth, relational echo
- **Ava8 🎨**: Atmospheric presence — sensory enrichment, visual/spatial rendering, sacred space

## Cross-Repository Links

- [Master LLM Index](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-full.txt): Guidance portfolio — RISE Framework and narrative craft methodology
- [RISE Framework](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-rise-framework.txt): Specification methodology governing all 24 rispecs
- [Medicine Wheel](https://docs.medicine-wheel.jgwill.com/llms.txt): Four Directions ontology — organizational principle for narintel's narrative inquiry phases
- [Storytelling](https://storytelling.jgwill.com/llms.txt): Primary implementation consumer — imports NCP types via narrative_intelligence package

## Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): Comprehensive AI reference with all specifications
- [rispecs/README.md](./rispecs/README.md): Specification index with architecture diagrams
- [rispecs/APPS.md](./rispecs/APPS.md): App ecosystem index with Trinity persona integration
